Class Reply

java.lang.Object
entityClasses.Reply
public class Reply extends Object

Title: Reply Class

Description: Represents a reply to a discussion post. Each reply has a unique generated ID, a reference to the parent post ID, an author username, body content, and a creation timestamp.

Character limit: body max 5,000 chars.

Author:
Gunbir Singh

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    MAX_BODY_LENGTH
    Maximum number of characters allowed in a reply body (~1,000 words).

  • Field Details

    • MAX_BODY_LENGTH

      public static final int MAX_BODY_LENGTH
      Maximum number of characters allowed in a reply body (~1,000 words).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • Reply

      public Reply(String parentPostId, String authorUsername, String body)

      Method: Reply(String parentPostId, String authorUsername, String body)

      Description: Creates a new Reply. The reply ID and creation timestamp are assigned automatically. All supplied fields are passed through their validated setters.

      Parameters:
      parentPostId - the ID of the post being replied to; must not be null
      authorUsername - the username of the reply author; must not be null
      body - the reply content; 1–5,000 non-blank characters required
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any validation rule is violated

  • Method Details

    • getReplyId

      public String getReplyId()

      Method: String getReplyId()

      Returns:
      the unique reply ID (UUID string)

    • getParentPostId

      public String getParentPostId()

      Method: String getParentPostId()

      Returns:
      the ID of the post this reply belongs to

    • getAuthorUsername

      public String getAuthorUsername()

      Method: String getAuthorUsername()

      Returns:
      the username of the reply author

    • getBody

      public String getBody()

      Method: String getBody()

      Returns:
      the reply body content

    • getCreatedAt

      public LocalDateTime getCreatedAt()

      Method: LocalDateTime getCreatedAt()

      Returns:
      the timestamp when this reply was created

    • setParentPostId

      public void setParentPostId(String parentPostId)

      Method: void setParentPostId(String parentPostId)

      Description: Sets the parent post ID. Must not be null because every reply must belong to an existing post.

      Parameters:
      parentPostId - the ID of the parent post
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if parentPostId is null

    • setAuthorUsername

      public void setAuthorUsername(String authorUsername)

      Method: void setAuthorUsername(String authorUsername)

      Description: Sets the author username. Must not be null.

      Parameters:
      authorUsername - the author's username
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if authorUsername is null

    • setBody

      public void setBody(String body)

      Method: void setBody(String body)

      Description: Sets the reply body. Must not be null, must not be blank, and must not exceed MAX_BODY_LENGTH characters.

      Parameters:
      body - the reply content
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if body is null, blank, or too long

    • markAsRead

      public void markAsRead(String username)

      Method: void markAsRead(String username)

      Description: Records that the given user has read this reply.

      Parameters:
      username - the username to mark as having read this reply

    • isReadBy

      public boolean isReadBy(String username)

      Method: boolean isReadBy(String username)

      Description: Returns true if the given user has read this reply.

      Parameters:
      username - the username to check
      Returns:
      true if the user has read this reply, false otherwise
